name: Silk Dream Heatless Curling Set

name: Sculpt & Lift Gua Sha Stone
tagline: The jade sculpting ritual for a defined jawline and lifted glow
description: A genuine Xiuyan jade gua sha stone shaped to hug your jawline, cheekbones and neck. Used for a few minutes a day with your favorite oil or serum, it supports lymphatic drainage, eases tension, and leaves skin looking sculpted, rested and glowing.
